## [Phase 0] Requirements — Feature Analysis

This issue was automatically created by the workflow.

### Objective

Gather, analyze, and document the requirements for this feature before implementation begins.

### Tasks

#### 1. Requirements Analysis
- [ ] Define functional requirements and user stories
- [ ] Identify acceptance criteria
- [ ] Document non-functional requirements (performance, security, UX)

#### 2. Technical Analysis
- [ ] Identify affected components and files
- [ ] Assess impact on existing functionality
- [ ] Define API changes or new endpoints (if applicable)
- [ ] Identify dependencies on other systems or libraries

#### 3. Design
- [ ] Propose technical approach
- [ ] Document data model changes (if applicable)
- [ ] Create wireframes or UI mockups (if applicable)
- [ ] Document edge cases and error scenarios

### Expected Deliverables

1. **Requirements Document** — Functional and non-functional requirements
2. **Technical Approach** — Proposed implementation strategy
3. **Acceptance Criteria** — Clear criteria for feature completeness

### Guidelines

- Follow project conventions in `copilot-instructions.md`
- Keep the feature scope focused — avoid scope creep
- Document any open questions or decisions needed
